claims.claim: In a 16-seed experiment with an elastic-net logistic regression proxy (10,000 training examples, 6,000 test examples per seed), dynamic-window training improved accuracy by 6.1–7.0 percentage points at tight budgets (8, 16, 32 tokens) while degrading full-budget (64-token) accuracy by 0.19 percentage points.
